name: Market Intelligence and Forecasting v1
description: Analytical summaries covering market-data governance, signal architecture, forecasting discipline, and model governance for engineers building market-intelligence features. Each item describes patterns for producing and governing analytical signals responsibly at a conceptual level. Nothing here is financial or investment advice, and no item should be read as a recommendation to buy or sell.
license: Original professional summaries authored for LocalAIFactory. No third-party text reproduced verbatim.
legalLimitations: These are practical, analytical summaries only and are NOT financial, investment, legal, or regulatory advice. They describe how to build and govern analytical intelligence and forecasting features. No item provides a recommendation to buy or sell any asset, no outcome is guaranteed, and past performance does not predict future results. Jurisdiction-specific rules on financial promotions, advice, and market data licensing must be confirmed against current applicable regulations and data-provider terms before use.
sourcePolicy: Original summaries only. No proprietary/official text copied verbatim. Every item carries a limitation note and confidence.
